1.Title: Red Chili Oil Hot Pot
1.Description: When activating an <color=#FFFFFF>Assist Follow-Up</color>, the equipper's Daze inflicted on the target increases by <color=#2BAD00>7.2%</color>, and DMG dealt increases by <color=#2BAD00>7.2%</color> for 30s. Repeated triggers reset the duration.
